def solve(nums : Array(Int64), queries : Array(Array(Int64))) : Array(Int64)
    ans = []
    for query in queries
        l = query[0]
        r = query[1]
        t = query[2]
        freq = Hash(Int64, Int64).new
        (l..r).each do |i|
            num = nums[i]
            freq[num] += 1
        end
        max_freq = 0
        best_num = -1
        freq.each do |key, count|
            if count >= t
                if count > max_freq
                    max_freq = count
                    best_num = key
                elsif count == max_freq
                    if key < best_num
                        best_num = key
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        ans << best_num if best_num != -1
        ans << -1 if best_num == -1
    end
    ans
end
```
